core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Organic Nature aesthetics with Swiss Precision layouts.
Emotion First: The interface must feel 'Guided' and 'Calm', not just functional.
Content is King: The 'Journey' is the hero. The UI is the map.
Zoom In: Use large, bold typography for stage names to create focus.
Negative Space: Generous padding (p-8 to p-12) to prevent cognitive overload.
anti_patterns: No center-aligned text blocks longer than 3 lines.
No gradients that look like default CSS presets.

usage_rules: Headings must use 'Outfit'. If not available, use a similar geometric sans with character.
Body text must use 'Inter' for maximum legibility in questionnaires.
Use 'tracking-tight' on all headings larger than 24px.

primary.description: Deep Forest Green - Used for primary actions, active states, and strong branding.

secondary.description: Bone White - Used for page backgrounds to avoid sterile white.

accent.description: Warm Terracotta - Used for 'Next Step' calls to action and alerts.

muted.description: Sage Grey - Used for inactive states, borders, and secondary text.

card.description: Pure White - Used for content containers to pop against the Bone background.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-muted text-foreground hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-card border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl p-6
cards.interactive: group cursor-pointer bg-card border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/30 shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl p-6

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-lg border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

timeline.node: absolute -left-[9px] top-0 h-4 w-4 rounded-full bg-background border-2 border-muted group-hover:border-primary transition-colors
timeline.node_active: absolute -left-[11px] top-0 h-5 w-5 rounded-full bg-primary border-4 border-background shadow-[0_0_0_4px_rgba(26,77,46,0.2)]

images.description: Green grass path - Use for Landing Page Hero background with overlay.
images.alt: A peaceful green path representing the client journey

images.description: Team meeting - Use for 'About Us' or 'Team' section.
images.alt: Professional team collaborating in a warm environment

images.description: Winding road - Use for 'How it Works' or 'Process' section background.
images.alt: A winding road symbolizing the structured process

accessibility_rules.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA standards. Use 'text-foreground' on 'bg-background'.
accessibility_rules.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (ring-2 ring-primary).

universal_guidelines: Ensure mobile responsiveness for all layouts (stack columns on mobile).
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the new color palette and font families. 2. Install 'lucide-react' and 'sonner'. 3. Create the 'Outfit' font import in 'index.css'. 4. Build the 'Timeline' component first as it is the core visual metaphor. 5. Use the provided image URLs for the landing page.
